text:
Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 1:
Professor Weber encourages creativity and allows students to explore their own ideas.

Review 2:
The class atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming.

Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 3:
Projects were interesting and relevant to the field of design.

Review 4:
Feedback was detailed and helped improve my work.

Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 5:
The workload is manageable for most students.

Review 6:
Professor Weber is knowledgeable and passionate about design.

Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 7:
Students are encouraged to participate and share ideas.

Review 8:
The course helped me build confidence in my creative abilities.

Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 9:
Assignments were practical and engaging.

Review 10:
The grading process was fair and transparent.

Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 11:
Some project requirements could have been explained more clearly.

Review 12:
The pace was comfortable throughout the semester.

Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 13:
Not every lecture was equally engaging, but the overall experience was positive.

Review 14:
I would recommend this professor to students interested in design.

Professor: Craig Weber
Source: craig_weber_reviews.txt

Review 15:
Overall a strong professor who creates a supportive learning environment.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 1:
Professor Kueper explains engineering concepts in a way that is easy for beginners to understand.

Review 2:
The class is organized and expectations are clear from the first day.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 3:
Assignments are straightforward and reinforce lecture material well.

Review 4:
One of the most approachable professors in the department.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 5:
He is patient when answering questions and never makes students feel uncomfortable.

Review 6:
The workload is very manageable compared to other engineering courses.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 7:
Lectures are engaging and easy to follow.

Review 8:
Professor Kueper genuinely wants every student to succeed.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 9:
The exams were fair and closely matched the material covered in class.

Review 10:
Excellent professor for students new to engineering.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 11:
Feedback on assignments was helpful and encouraging.

Review 12:
Office hours were useful and welcoming.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 13:
Sometimes the pace felt a little slow for students with prior experience.

Review 14:
The course was enjoyable and stress free.

Professor: Robert Kueper
Source: robert_kueper_reviews.txt

Review 15:
I would gladly take another course with Professor Kueper.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 1:
The course was extremely challenging and required a lot of independent learning.

Review 2:
Lecture explanations were often difficult to follow.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 3:
Assignments were significantly harder than examples shown in class.

Review 4:
The professor knows the material well but struggles to communicate concepts clearly.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 5:
Students should expect to spend many hours outside class learning on their own.

Review 6:
Project instructions could have been more detailed.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 7:
Exams were difficult and focused heavily on problem solving.

Review 8:
The pace of the course was faster than expected.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 9:
I often relied on online resources to understand the material.

Review 10:
The grading felt strict compared to other professors.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 11:
Office hours were helpful when available.

Review 12:
The workload was overwhelming at times.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 13:
Students with previous programming experience may do better in this class.

Review 14:
I learned valuable concepts but struggled with the teaching style.

Professor: Guozhen An
Source: guozhen_an_reviews.txt

Review 15:
The course can be rewarding, but it requires significant dedication and self-study.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 1:
Professor Trowbridge explains difficult engineering concepts clearly and gives examples that help students understand the material.

Review 2:
The workload is challenging but fair. If you stay on top of assignments, you can do well in the course.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 3:
His lectures are organized and he expects students to come prepared to class.

Review 4:
One of the most knowledgeable professors I have had. He clearly has industry experience and connects theory to real-world applications.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 5:
The exams are difficult but reflect what is taught during lectures.

Review 6:
He pushes students to think critically rather than memorize information.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 7:
Attendance is important because lecture material often goes beyond the textbook.

Review 8:
I learned more in this class than in most of my other engineering courses.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 9:
Professor Trowbridge is approachable during office hours and willing to help students who make an effort.

Review 10:
The projects were time-consuming but helped reinforce the course concepts.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 11:
Expect a fast-paced course. Staying behind even one week can make the class harder.

Review 12:
Grading was fair and expectations were clearly communicated throughout the semester.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 13:
Some lectures moved too quickly, especially when covering advanced topics.

Review 14:
The course requires significant work outside of class and may be difficult for students with weak math backgrounds.

Professor: Steven Trowbridge
Source: steven_trowbridge_reviews.txt

Review 15:
Overall an excellent professor who challenges students while helping them build strong engineering skills.

Professor: Belle Birchfield
Source: belle_birchfield_reviews.txt

Review 1:
Professor Birchfield creates a welcoming classroom environment and makes students feel comfortable asking questions.

Review 2:
The course material is presented clearly and is easy to follow.

Professor: Belle Birchfield

Review 4:
One of the most supportive professors at QCC.

Professor: Belle Birchfield
Source: belle_birchfield_reviews.txt

Review 6:
Grading is fair and feedback is helpful.

Professor: Belle Birchfield
Source: belle_birchfield_reviews.txt

Review 7:
The class is well organized and expectations are clear from the beginning.

Review 8:
Professor Birchfield genuinely wants students to succeed.

Professor: Belle Birchfield
Source: belle_birchfield_reviews.txt

Review 9:
The workload is manageable even for students taking multiple courses.

Review 10:
Lectures are engaging and easy to understand.

Professor: Belle Birchfield
Source: belle_birchfield_reviews.txt

Review 11:

Review 12:
A great professor for students who are new to the subject.

Professor: Belle Birchfield
Source: belle_birchfield_reviews.txt

Review 13:
The projects were interesting and helped reinforce the material.

Review 14:
I would absolutely take another class with Professor Birchfield.

Professor: Belle Birchfield
Source: belle_birchfield_reviews.txt

Review 15:
The class was slightly slower paced than expected, but overall it was an excellent learning experience.

Professor: Danny Mangra
Source: danny_mangra_reviews.txt

Review 1:

Review 2:
The course material is practical and relevant to computer science students.

Review 3:
Assignments helped reinforce programming concepts.

Review 4:
The workload was reasonable throughout the semester.

Review 6:
Instructions for projects could have been clearer.

Source: danny_mangra_reviews.txt

Review 8:
Professor Mangra was willing to answer questions when asked.

Professor: Danny Mangra
Source: danny_mangra_reviews.txt

Review 9:

Review 10:

Source: danny_mangra_reviews.txt

Review 11:

Review 12:

Source: danny_mangra_reviews.txt

Review 13:
The course experience largely depends on how much effort the student puts in.

Review 14:
Some assignments felt repetitive.

Source: danny_mangra_reviews.txt

Review 15:

Professor: Ali Ragoub
Source: ali_ragoub_reviews.txt

Review 1:

Review 2:
The course is well organized and easy to follow.

Source: ali_ragoub_reviews.txt

Review 3:

Review 4:
One of the best professors I have taken at QCC.

Professor: Ali Ragoub
Source: ali_ragoub_reviews.txt

Review 6:

Review 8:
He creates a positive learning environment.

Source: ali_ragoub_reviews.txt

Review 14:
